# Tween sample description

**Article**

An atom that contains information for converting from media time to sample number to sample location for tweens.

## Overview

The tween sample description uses the standard sample description header, as described in [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Sample_table_atom].

The data format field in the sample description is always set to `'twen'`. The tween media handler adds no additional fields to the sample description.

## Storing tween media

- **Tween sample data**
- **Tween type categories**
- **Tween QT atom container**: Specify the characteristics of a tween with atoms in a tween QT atom container.
